case_title: CARLOS CALIX VS. GABRIELA SALAS et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-19-2012 - JUDGMENT.
RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT.

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CALIX, CARLOS D.B.A. CALIX JANITORIAL ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (SERVICE FEE $35.00<WAIVED>) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CALIX, CARLOS D.B.A. CALIX JANITORIAL AS TO DEFENDANT ABRALDES, RITA

TRIAL RESET TO AUG-10-2012 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JUN-04-2012 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-10-2012 - PARTIES PRESENT WERE SWORN AND TESTIFIED. CO-DEFENDANT RITA ABRALDES WAS DISMISSED AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST IN OPEN COURT. MATTER WAS CONTINUED TO 10-19-12 @ 3:30 P.M. FOR STATUS REPORT ON PROGRESS OF PAYMENTS AGREED UPON BY THE PARTIES AT THE HEARING. JPT. JEAN MILEFF. (506)
RETURNED MAIL: ORDER OF DISMISSAL MAILED TO RITA ABRALDES.

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (SERVICE FEE $35.00<WAIVED>) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CALIX, CARLOS D.B.A. CALIX JANITORIAL AS TO DEFENDANT SALAS, GABRIELA D.B.A. CHARANGA
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR DISCREPANCIES IN HEARING TIME 8:30AM AND 3:30PM. CASE HEARD AT 3:30PM. HEARING SET FOR OCT-19-2012 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$0.00<WAIVED>) SERVED JUN-22-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ABRALDES, RITA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$0.00<WAIVED>) SERVED JUL-05-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SALAS, GABRIELA D.B.A. CHARANGA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-10-2012 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO OCT-19-2012 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506
RETURNED MAIL: CONTINUE ORDER MAILED 8/10/12 TO DEFENDANT GABRIELA SALAS, RETURNED "NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED/UNABLE TO FORWARD".
RETURNED MAIL: ORDER OF DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION MAILED ON 10/19/12 TO DEFENDANT GABRIELA SALAS, "NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED/UNABLE TO FORWARD".
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DISMISSAL ORDER OF 10/19/12 HEARD AT 8:30AM IS SET ASIDE BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF OCT-19-2012 AT 3:30 PM. DISCREPANCIES IN HEARING TIME 8:30AM AND 3:30PM.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-19-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-19-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---NEPTALI GONZALES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CALIX, CARLOS D.B.A. CALIX JANITORIAL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SALAS, GABRIELA D.B.A. CHARANGA $704.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $704.00, DISMISSAL FILED AGAINST DEFENDANT RITA ABRALDES--FILED ON 8/10/12. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
